editor.title: Annotate screenshot
editor.description.label: Description

recorder.title: Record screencast
recorder.mic.label: Microphone
recorder.mic.none: No microphone detected — recording without audio.
recorder.mic.denied: Microphone access denied. Allow it in the site settings to record voice.
recorder.camera.label: Camera bubble
recorder.limitReached: Maximum recording length reached — recording stopped and saved.
recorder.screenDenied: Screen capture was cancelled or denied.
options.title: UsrHelper Settings
options.reporter.title: Reporter details
options.reporter.hint: Included in every report file and email so the developer knows who to contact.
options.profiles.title: Project profiles
options.profiles.name: Profile name
options.folder.label: Subfolder in Downloads
options.folder.hint: Files are saved under Downloads/<subfolder>/ with a timestamp in the name.
options.template.label: Description template
options.template.hint: Pre-filled in the description field of every new report.
mailto.truncated: (Description truncated — see the attached .json file for the full report.)
options.console.domainsHint: Comma-separated, e.g. app.example.com, *.staging.example.com, localhost. Leave empty and console errors are not captured anywhere — the extension then stays out of every page’s call stack, so no site can see it. Uncaught errors and rejected promises are always captured, on every page.
